title: ligusticum glaucifolium
intro: Ligusticum glaucifolium, also known as Lovage, is a perennial plant belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties, making it useful for treating respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds. The health benefits of Lovage include reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and acting as an antioxidant to protect against cell damage. Lovage is commonly prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used in cooking as a flavoring agent, particularly for soups and stews.
